title: neotinea intacta f. tridentata
intro: Neotinea intacta f. tridentata, also known as the 'Tridentate Neotinea' or 'Pyramidal Orchid,' is a species of orchid that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Neotinea intacta f. tridentata include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, this plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including ointments and poultices.
